Registry / Terms / terminal

terminal

VIMLFull match — VIML 2022 G 18 #00901 · 4 instances

Authoritative definition

VIML 2022 Latest · concept #5.10view ↗

digital device that has one or more keys (or mouse, touch-screen, etc.) to operate the instrument, and a display to provide the measurement results transmitted via the digital interface or an analog data processing device

  • VIML 2022 · #5.10
    digital device that has one or more keys (or mouse, touch-screen, etc.) to operate the instrument, and a display to provide the measurement results transmitted via the digital interface or an analog data processing device

Suggested actions

  1. MEDIUM 3 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

3 distinct definitions across 4 publications. 1 definitions are shared by multiple publications (merge candidates).

2 identical2010202X
digital device that has one or more keys (or mouse, touch-screen, etc.) to operate the instrument, and a display to provide the weighing results transmitted via the digital interface of a weighing module or an analog data processing device
Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Consistency
20102006OIML R 76-1:2006T.2.2.500901pending
202X2006OIML R 76-1:2006T.2.2.500901pending

2 unique definitions (each used by only one publication)

Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Definition
202X2020OIML R150-1:20202.2.8.803560
digital device equipped with operator interface(s) such as keypad, mouse, touch-screen, etc. used to monitor the operations of the instrument, often equipped with a display to provide the feedback to the operator, such as weighing results, mass flowrate, etc. transmitted via the digital interface of a weighing module or an analog data processing device
pending
202X2017OIML R061-1:20173.3.11.603684
digital device equipped with operator interface(s) such as keypad, mouse, touch-screen, etc. used to monitor the operations of the instrument. Also equipped with a display to provide the feedback to the operator, such as: weighing results, pre-set value, fills per minute, etc. transmitted via the digital interface of a weighing module or an analog data processing device
pending
